science_tech.titulo: Two decades later, impacts from Indonesia mud volcano linger

science_tech.titulo: Mosquitoes learn to link the smell of DEET with a blood meal, new study finds
science_tech.resumo: Mosquito repellents are key to protecting ourselves from mosquito bites and the pathogens they might carry. The most widely used active ingredient in insect repellents is N,N-diethyl-meta-toluamide, commonly known as DEET.

science_tech.titulo: Researchers teach brain cells to play 'Doom'
science_tech.resumo: Australian researchers have trained lab-grown brain cells on a silicon computer chip to play the nineties shooter game "Doom" and say they are just scratching the surface of what the neurons could be capable of doing.
